title: User with view access should be able to click 'like' in an email and be taken to the item

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, if a user with viewer access clicks the ‘like’ or ‘reply on monday.com’ buttons in the email notification they receive, they are taken to a landing page that says "this page is restricted.

Request: A user with viewer access should be able to click the ‘like’ or ‘reply on monday.com’ buttons in the email notification they receive and be taken to the item the same as someone with member access.

The only difference would be that the json doesn’t update the like button.

2024-03-15_15h18_401484×771 50.1 KB
